title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Exodus launches AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana
summary: The crypto wallet company pairs the XO Cash token with software tools that let AI agents transact using preset spending controls and stablecoin payments.

title: Crypto Biz: Wall Street wants more than just Bitcoin
summary: Institutional capital is returning to crypto as Bitcoin ETFs surge, prediction markets mature and banks accelerate tokenized finance adoption.

title: Lime, the Uber-backed micromobility company, files for IPO
summary: After years of hints and preparation, Lime plans to enter the public markets.

title: Stablecoins won’t strengthen global role of euro, ECB’s Lagarde says
summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde said Europe should build tokenized settlement infrastructure anchored by central bank money rather than rely on private stablecoins.

title: Mantle tokenholders approve 30K ETH Aave credit facility after rsETH exploit
summary: The credit facility would help Aave address bad debt created after the April rsETH exploit strained its WETH market.

title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
summary: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

title: Solv Protocol Will Dump LayerZero, Migrate $700M Tokenized Bitcoin Tech to Chainlink
summary: Solv Protocol will move its tokenized Bitcoin infrastructure to Chainlink, following Kelp DAO's lead after it blamed LayerZero for a hack.

title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
summary: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

title: OpenAI前董事：馬斯克主動捐精 兩人已有四個孩子
summary: OpenAI前董事齊利斯出庭作證，透露她與伊隆·馬斯克已育有4名子女。2020年馬斯克主動提議捐贈精子，她因健康因素接受。兩人約十年前曾有過一次「短暫」的戀情，但生子時並非戀愛關係。
